title: 🕰 Temporal Bleed Entities
name: Temporal Bleed Entities
what_it_is: Beings partially unstuck in time—leaking versions of past and future selves, layered like translucent temporal skins.
how_to_use: she flickers through her own timeline—each gesture followed by echoes from other versions
his face is a chorus of time—past mouths whisper, future eyes weep
animation_behavior: Past and future selves shimmer behind current form, movement layered with time-ghosts, voice splits into temporal echoes ---
